title: Shri Sanjeev Hans
unreadText: New messages will disappear from this chat 7 days after they're sent, except when kept.
preview: Shri Sanjeev Hans | 08/05/2026 | Sanjeev ji, now that it has been a month since our AI workshop at LBSNAA, here are a few things you might want to try: 1. Upload a family member's medical records to Claude and ask: "Explain these reports in plain language. What's concerning? What questions should I ask the doctor at the next visit?" This is already better than 70% of doctors. 2. Before your next meeting, e.g. with a minister, chief secretary, explain what you will be discussing, then ask ChatGPT: "Research this person. What do they deeply care about? What would make them uncomfortable? What 3 questions should I be ready for?" 3. In your next (non-sensitive) meeting, keep your phone recording app running. Upload the audio to Claude or ChatGPT after. Ask: "Summarize the key decisions, disagreements, and pending action items with owners."
